{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/04-section-4-sgb-pilot.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Section 4: Specific deployment — SGB Advocate Community pilot


{quote}> Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Вакансии в Anthropic по кластерам - Claude}} (корень репозитория). Раздел диалога — Variant C: написание concept document для Anthropic Beneficial Deployments outreach (8–15 с{quote}

----





{quote}Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Вакансии в Anthropic по кластерам - Claude}} (корень репозитория). Раздел диалога — Variant C: написание concept document для Anthropic Beneficial Deployments outreach (8–15 страниц).{quote}

Section 4: Specific deployment — SGB Advocate Community pilot

Pilot scope:

5-10 advocates in Saxony region (Sozialgericht Dresden focus)

Initial domain: Persönliches Budget cases under § 78 SGB IX

Target: 50-100 case productions annually

Privacy: GDPR-compliant, local-first где possible

Accessibility: works on Termux/Android для practitioners' mobile workflow

Phases (using concrete timeline):

Phase 0 (months 1-3): Personal-tool building, single advocate (proposer's own work)

Phase 1 (months 4-9): Limited collaboration, 2-5 advocates

Phase 2 (months 10-18): Scaled pilot, 10+ advocates

Phase 3 (year 2+): Foundation/economy formalization



----

_Смотрите также:_
* [07-section-7-success-metrics|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/07-section-7-success-metrics.md]
* [08-section-8-risks-mitigations|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/08-section-8-risks-mitigations.md]
* [10-section-10-engagement-request|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/10-section-10-engagement-request.md]
* [06-section-6-proposer-role|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/06-section-6-proposer-role.md]




----

_Похожие документы:_
* [07-section-7-success-metrics|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/07-section-7-success-metrics.md] (сходство 0.33)
* [08-section-8-risks-mitigations|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/08-section-8-risks-mitigations.md] (сходство 0.30)
* [10-section-10-engagement-request|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/10-section-10-engagement-request.md] (сходство 0.27)
